jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Biocon - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Biocon in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Biocon:
Biocon is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Biocon!
